channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two U.S. troops killed in Iranian missile attack on Jordan
item.description: Two U.S. service members died and others were wounded in an Iranian ballistic missile strike on a Jordan airbase.

item.title: Iran's supreme leader accuses Trump of breaking deal, promises strong retaliation
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei on Saturday accused President Trump of violating the U.S.-Iran agreement and threatened a forceful response.

item.title: AI race splits as China leads open-weight model challenge
item.description: China's latest AI breakthrough forces Silicon Valley to consider that building the world's smartest models may no longer be exclusive.

item.title: Judges navigate AI's role in courtrooms
item.description: Judges are setting AI guidelines for lawyers and litigants, reprimanding those who fail to verify their submissions.
